case_title: FAZIOLA, HILDA vs. FOCHT, LINDA et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT FOCHT, LINDA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
JUDGE PRO TEM: STUART BRONSTEIN. CLERK: MSANCHEZ; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO. CASE SETTLED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOCHT, LINDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 267 11TH AVE. #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL OCT-31-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFENDANT TO MAKE FOUR PAYMENTS OF $1,016.16 TO PLAINTIFF ON 7/1/00, 8/1/00, 9/1/00 & 10/1/00.
